title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad I made it in time!! It's alright now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the Dressrossa and produce group, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What happened just now? How did you get here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a ship, of course. Although, it's a little behind where we are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thank you for making this long journey!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just now, this ship was targeted by pirates that were under the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Were they shooting a torpedo!? Thank goodness they missed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are you doing over there, Helmetpo- San?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were using a submarine... We cannot let our guards down when it comes to pirates these days...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But anyway... Koby!! What the hell is up with your colour of observation!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I've captured all of the pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I wasn't able to sense a thing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to skewer these bastards together and roast them over a fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They will definitely be punished severely, princess.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You! You're the famous captain koby!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the hero that protected all of the citizens in the Rocky Port incident!

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
